channel.title: Microsoft Sentinel on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Microsoft Sentinel on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Virtual network flow logs connector with Microsoft Sentinel
item.description:
Azure virtual network flow logs connector with Microsoft Sentinel is now generally available. It lets you export and analyze network traffic data in Microsoft Sentinel security workflows.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: security: Simplifying AWS defense with Microsoft Sentinel UEBA
item.description:
Microsoft says Sentinel UEBA can help defenders separate normal AWS activity from suspicious behavior by turning raw CloudTrail logs into binary behavioral signals based on user, peer, and device baselines.

  • Source: Microsoft Security Blog
